title: March 15
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|March}}

'''March 15''' is the 74th day of the year (75th in leap years). There are 291 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1971]] – [[Javier Saltares]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Cara Pifko]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 6|''Star Wars Weekly'' 6]] published.
*[[1980]] – [[Alex Segura]] is born.
*[[1983]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 72|''Star Wars'' (1977) 72]] published.
*[[1986]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 143|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 143]] published.
*[[1993]] – ''[[Galaxy Guide 8: Scouts]]'' published.
*[[2000]] – [[Chewbacca (2000) 3|''Chewbacca'' (2000) 3]] published.
*2001 – ''[[Damsel in Distress]]'' published online.
*[[2002]] – [[Star Wars Insider 59|''Star Wars Insider'' 59]] is released for subscribers.
*[[2011]] – Major update of the ''[[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion]]''.
*2011 – [[Star Wars Insider 124|''Star Wars Insider'' 124]] published.
*[[2016]] – [[Star Wars Insider 164|''Star Wars Insider'' 164]] published.
*[[2017]] – [[Poe Dameron 12|''Poe Dameron'' 12]] published.
*2017 – "[[The Size of the Fight]]" published.
*2017 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 29|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 29]] published.
*[[2022]] – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: Legacy Vol. 4]]'' published.
*2022 – [[The High Republic: Tempest Runner (script)|''The High Republic: Tempest Runner'' script]] published.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian: May the Force Be with You]]'' published.
*2022 – [[Star Wars Insider 209|''Star Wars Insider'' 209]] published.
*[[2023]] – "[[Pabu (episode)|Pabu]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*2023 – "[[Chapter 19: The Convert]]" airs on Disney+.
*2023 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2022) 3|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2022) 3]] published.
*2023 – [[Yoda 5|''Yoda'' 5]] published.
*[[2024]] – "[[The Prince and the Pirate]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
*[[2025]] – "[[Nubs Faces a Bug]]" released on [[StarWarsKids.com]].
